## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the gap. Who is affected and how often?
     e.g. "There's no way to list publications / open-source contributions / speaking engagements." -->

## Describe the solution you'd like

<!-- What should the new feature look like from the user's point of view?
     If it adds a new config field, show an example: -->

```yaml
# example new field
publications:
  - title: "My Paper"
    url: "https://..."
    year: 2024
```

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Any workarounds you've tried, or other approaches that could work. -->
